title: Super Kitchen Large Muffin Tray 12 Cup Silicone Muffin Pan, Non-Stick Muffin Cupcake Tin, Baking Mould for Muffins or Cupcakes, Bakeware 33 x 25 x 3 cm (Grey)
features: [ Upgraded Version ] See the second image. Muffin pan size is 13x9.8x1.2 in (33 x 25 x 3 cm). It is larger than most muffin pans on the market. See the third picture. Because of the extra connection design between cups, our muffin mould is more stable than other soft version. Attention: Due to the soft nature of silicone, please place the muffin mold on your baking tray before filling and putting into oven to prevent spills. Fill and bake following your recipe instructions.

[ Food Grade Material ] This silicone muffin mould is made from NO BPA food grade silicone. No cracking, odourless, non-toxic harmless. Our muffin pan can be used at temperature ranging from -40°F up to 450°f (-40°C to 230°C), suitable for oven, microwave, dishwasher and freezer.

[ Non-stick And Easy Baking ] Thanks to the non-stick surface, your baked goods will not stick to the bottom of your baking tin. And this silicone muffin pan is flexible, so you can pop out the cupcakes easily with pressed finger. Unlike the Carbon Steel tin, our non stick silicone coating of baking pan will not fall off or rust. Extremely long-lasting to use.

[ Versatility ] These muffin tins not only can be used to make muffins, but also perfect for baking cupcakes, brownies, yorkshire pudding, mini pie crust, chocolate, egg muffins, cookies, cake pops, tarts, pudding, baked oatmeal cups, chicken pot pie cups and so on.

[ Easy to Clean ] Thanks to the non-stick surface, you can clean our bakeware accessories easily. Just rinse them in soapy water for a couple of minutes, then wipe off with the wet cloth and allow to air dry. Or put the silicon baking sheet in the top rack of the dishwasher.
